Here is the breakdown of credit usage per action

CapabilityAction One credits* required per action
Editor ProNo credits needed0
Accessibility scansNo credits needed0
Site managementNo credits needed0
Accessibility fixes1 AI accessibility fix20
Image optimization1 image optimized10
Email deliverability1 email delivery10
Cookie consent1 consent1
Cookie consent scans1 scan1
AI Actions (text, code, image &, container generation and more)1 AI action1-40**

*Required One credits per action may change from time to time, applying to all plans regardless of purchase date.
** AI Actions measure the usage of generative AI features like text, code, image, and container creation. The exact number of credits for each AI Action varies based on the use case and prompt.

Key features & benefits

Customization options for Web Creators
  • Show icon / Hide icon
  • Color selection
  • Icon color
  • Icon positioning
  • Icon selection
  • Add accessibility statement URL
  • Icon size
  • Sitemap URL
  • Skip to main content
  • Generate the accessibility statement
Customization options for website visitors
  • Hide the icon
  • Restore defaults
  • Grayscale
  • Contrast scale
  • Links underline
  • Readable font
  • Sitemap
  • Hide images
  • Increase/Decrease text size
  • Pause animations
  • Reading guide
  • Line height
  • Text align
  • Focus outline
  • Skip to main content
Premium features
  • White labeling
  • Screen reader compatibility
  • Widget usage analytics
  • Language Selector

Level up your site with Elementor One

Power your website with an upgraded subscription that includes Elementor’s Editor and capabilities like AI, image optimization, email deliverability, accessibility, site management, cookie consent, and future tools.

Unify your workflow: Bring website creation, optimization, and management into a single, fluid workflow.

Activate one flexible plan: Use one pool of shared credits across multiple tools. Prioritize usage as needed.

Simplify your spend: No surprise costs or the need to buy or manage separate plans and credit limits.

Create with full design freedom

Build any WordPress site you imagine with drag-and-drop, premium widgets. No code, no limits.

Optimize sites for maximum impact

Optimize your site with tools that boost performance, SEO rankings, and inclusive user experiences. 

Manage projects past the finish line

Manage your sites with intuitive email deliverability, and a centralized dashboard for managing sites.

Build pixel-perfect websites

From portfolio sites to online stores, gain complete control over your site’s content, layout, and behavior with Elementor’s drag-and-drop Editor.

Theme Builder

Create custom templates for headers, footers, single posts, archive pages, and everything in between.

Custom Code and CSS

Customize designs and behaviors beyond standard controls with AI-generated or manually-written code.

Motion Effects

Make your website stand out with advanced motion effects, page transitions, scrolling behaviors, and more.

1 / 1

Form Builder

Collect leads with custom-designed, multi-step forms and access submitted data directly from the WordPress dashboard.

Popup Builder

Create eye-catching popups and use display conditions to present them when and to whom they'll convert best.

Contact buttons

Turn each visit into a conversation with Floating Contact buttons, linking to SMS, WhatsApp, or Messenger.

0 / 0

Dynamic Content

Populate posts and listings automatically with content from WordPress using the Dynamic Content feature.

Dynamic widgets and tags

Assign a dynamic tag to any Elementor widget to create content-rich websites with sophisticated designs.

Custom Fields and Post Types

Leverage Elementor’s support of Custom Fields and Custom Post Types with integration to popular plugins.

0 / 0

WooCommerce Builder

Define the structure of your store, including product pages, mega menus, shop archives, and more.

eCommerce widgets

Create and customize every part of your online store with 20+ WooCommerce-specific widgets.

Purchase-ready pages

Design pages to transact sales, including the Cart, Checkout, My Account, and Purchase Summary.

0 / 0

Optimize impact at every level

Strengthen performance, discoverability, and accessibility with optimization tools purposely built to support high-quality web experiences.

Trusted by agencies and web creators

Trustpilot

Manage sites for the long run

Manage updates, monitor performance, and automate emails with tools built to support any number of sites, long after they first go live.

The power of native AI integration

Elementor AI

AI in the Editor

Generate custom CSS, code, layouts, images and text with a simple prompt directly in the Editor.

Angie

Vibe building

Build landing pages and custom widgets directly in WordPress without having to write any code yourself.

Ever-growing value

Constant innovation

Stay in the lead as we roll out new AI innovations and capabilities.

FAQ

Have more questions?
Go to the Elementor Help Center or Contact Us.

What’s the difference between Elementor Pro and Elementor One?

Elementor Pro gives you the Pro Editor with premium widgets, theme builder, and advanced design tools. Elementor One is a complete solution for web creation, optimization and management, including the Pro Editor plus additional capabilities including Image Optimization, Email Deliverability, Web Accessibility, Site Management and Cookie Consent all in a single subscription, with new capabilities constantly being automatically added to the subscription at no additional cost. If you currently use any of those capabilities separately, One is the more cost-effective way to get them together.

How does the Elementor One credit system work?

Each month, you get a pool of shared credits. You can use them across supported tools: AI content and image generation, email delivery, image optimization, site accessibility tools, and new capabilities as they launch.

How many credits does each action use?

Elementor One replaces separate quotas with a single, flexible credit pool that adapts to your workflow. This gives you the freedom to allocate resources exactly where your project needs them most.

Here is the breakdown of credit usage per action:

* Credit consumption remains dynamic and may change, applying to all plans regardless of purchase date.
** AI Actions measure the usage of generative AI features like text, code, image, and container creation. The exact number of credits for each AI Action varies based on the use case and prompt.

What happens to my credits at the end of the month?

You’ll get a full new set of credits each month, as your credit usage resets monthly. Unused credits don’t roll over to the next month.

What happens if I run out of credits?

If you run out of credits, you can either wait to get a new bank of credits that get replenished once a month or you can choose to upgrade to a higher tier plan for more monthly credits.

How do I install the One plan?

When you purchase a One plan, you’ll receive a .zip file of Elementor Pro.

Upload the .zip from the WordPress plugin screen.

Once installed, connect and activate your account.

You’ll be able to install all other available plugins directly from your WordPress dashboard.

Can I upgrade from my existing plan to Elementor One?

Yes. You can upgrade any of your Elementor Pro plans to a higher-tier Elementor One plan.

What’s actually included in Elementor One and how does it give me maximum value at a lower cost?

Elementor One centralizes creation, optimization and management capabilities into one subscription. This includes the Pro Editor, Agentic AI, Image Optimization, Email Deliverability, Web Accessibility, Site management and Cookie Consent with additional capabilities consistently being added to the subscription at no extra cost. Each of these applies to every site covered by your plan. Instead of paying for multiple plugins and services, you get bundled capabilities at a price that’s typically lower than buying them separately.

Who is Elementor One best for? Beginners, freelancers, or agencies?

Elementor One is designed for all types of web creators: newer users who want everything in one place, freelancers managing multiple clients, and agencies that need a scalable, integrated website creation platform.

Am I limited to how I use the monthly credits?

Credits are universal and can be used according to your priorities. One month you can focus on heavy AI usage, and the next month shift more credits to image optimization or email delivery, without changing plans or buying extra products.

What tools are included in Elementor One?

Elementor One includes the Editor Pro plus access to connected services powered by credits, such as AI generation, image optimization, email delivery, accessibility tools, site management, and future innovations added to the One experience.

Can I share Elementor One credits across multiple sites or clients?

If you purchased a One Agency subscription, you can use your credits across any of your client sites.

Do unused Elementor One credits roll over to the next month?

Credits are issued monthly and are designed to match typical usage patterns. They do not roll over, and each month starts you off with a fresh bank of credits.

What happens as Elementor releases new capabilities?

As Elementor adds new connected capabilities to the One experience, they become available within your Elementor One subscription, so your plan keeps improving over time.

What makes Elementor the leading website builder for WordPress?

Elementor is a leading all-in-one website builder for WordPress, combining powerful tools with an intuitive, user-friendly interface. With advanced features like Theme Builder, global site settings, responsive design controls, and custom CSS, it streamlines the site creation process and reduces plugin overload.

As a professional website building tool, Elementor allows businesses, agencies, and small business owners to build a website that reflects their brand, customize layouts easily, and manage complex websites without extensive coding knowledge. This makes it one of the best website builder options for creating fully functional, scalable WordPress sites with long-term business value.

Elementor Pro allows you to add advanced styling directly to sections, widgets, and templates, giving designers and developers full control over layout, meta tags, typography, and visual details while still using a drag-and-drop editor. Editor Pro balances flexibility and ease of use, making it suitable for both simple and more complex websites. Advanced users can extend designs with custom code. Most users just easily drag elements, customize styling, or interactions to create a great website without deep technical skills.

What core Editor Pro features does Elementor offer?

Editor Pro unlocks powerful tools such as: Theme Builder, dynamic content controls, WooCommerce integration for online stores, popups, forms, advanced marketing widgets, and more. The website builder empowers users to build any site, from small business websites to large, complex websites used by both agencies and enterprises. Features like global styles, dynamic content, and customization options make it easy to manage more complex websites efficiently.

Editor Pro offers a vast library of website templates, landing pages, and pre-designed sections to achieve different business goals. Templates support fast site creation, whether you’re launching a new site, promoting in-person events, starting marketing campaigns, or building pages to start selling online.

The free Editor, website builder plugin includes essential drag-and-drop tools, key widgets, and core site-building features. It’s best for creating a basic website, testing ideas, or launching a small business site.
For more advanced needs, Elementor Pro adds customization options like Theme Builder, custom CSS, built-in SEO tools, and marketing features. This flexibility allows users to start small and scale their own website as their business grows.

How does Elementor handle responsive design?

Elementor includes built-in responsive design tools that let you control layout, spacing, typography, and visibility for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices. Every website created with Elementor is mobile-friendly, helping businesses reach their target audience across different screen sizes.

Using the visual editor, you can preview breakpoints, adjust new pages, and ensure your site remains professional and user-friendly regardless of the device it is being viewed from. This saves valuable time while improving usability, SEO performance, and consistency across search engines and devices.

What happens to my plan if I already have a Pro subscription

If you’re already an Elementor user, don’t worry. Your current subscription won’t be impacted. You can continue using your plan exactly as it is.
However, if you’re ready to experience the full power of our unified website builder, you can choose to easily upgrade to Elementor One or purchase a new Elementor One plan.

 If I upgrade from Pro to One, will I be charged twice?

No. Upgrading from Pro to One is a prorated upgrade, not a separate purchase. The remainder of your current annual Pro subscription is credited toward the cost of One. You pay only the difference, not the full One price on top of your existing subscription. The final calculated price after the proration is visible in the checkout from the upgrade page in your my.elementor account.

Do I need to cancel my current Pro plan before buying One?

No. When you upgrade your Pro plan to One from within your Elementor account, the remaining value on your current plan is automatically credited toward the new subscription. If you cancel first, that credit is forfeited and you pay the full One price. To upgrade to One from an existing Pro plan, log into your my.elementor account, select your active plan under the subscriptions tab and choose the upgrade option from there.

Does Elementor One include hosting?

No. Elementor One does not include hosting. It includes the Pro Editor, Agentic AI, Image Optimization, Email Deliverability, Web Accessibility, Site Management and Cookie Consent. Elementor Host is a separate offering. However, you can use Elementor One on any compatible WordPress hosting provider.
